description: Stocks with RSI > 70 indicating overbought conditions, expecting pullback or correction

market_conditions.interpretation: High valuation with warming sentiment - caution recommended for overbought stocks

stocks.expected_reason: RSI > 70 suggests overbought, consider taking partial profits
RSI > 75 strongly overbought, high probability of pullback

strategy_validation.expected_behavior: Price should consolidate or pullback within 3-5 days

strategy_validation.key_insight: Overbought signals are less reliable in strong uptrends, use with trend confirmation

lessons_learned: RSI > 70 works best for short-term profit taking, not long-term trend reversal
Volume spike (>1.5x) with overbought = stronger signal
Overbought can persist in strong momentum (don't short blindly)
Take partial profits (50%) rather than full exit
Combine with MACD divergence for stronger reversal signals
